bead.title: Tier inference engine: pick cheap/standard/smart from bead metadata
bead.description: Follow-up to ddx-b790449b AC4. Hot-fix landed 'default to cheap tier always' for zero-config drains. This bead implements metadata-driven tier inference: read bead labels, kind, and estimated scope and return a recommended ModelTier. Aligns with endpoint-first routing redesign (project_endpoint_routing_design, 2026-04-21). Replace 'always cheap' default in cmd/agent_cmd.go runAgentExecuteLoopImpl with a call to this engine.
